purpose: Atomic model building, refinement, validation, and model/map review.

lane_dependencies.redistribution_policy: Not redistributed in the public model-build image. Operator installs ChimeraX 1.x at runtime from the upstream installer URL after confirming noncommercial use (or supplying a commercial license override). The license-gated installation path is documented in docs/tooling-and-licensing.md.

policy_notes: ChimeraX is noncommercial unless an explicit commercial license is held by the operator. Public model-build images do not bundle ChimeraX; runtime installation is operator-driven and recorded in validation/chimerax_license_posture.json before any render.
ISOLDE rides on the ChimeraX bundle; same license posture applies.
